goal: Sync install.sh with the new file structure and clean up stack templates

verify: grep -q '2 agent definitions' install.sh && echo OK

tasks.name: Remove Planning Docs from all 5 stack templates

verify: for f in docs/templates/CLAUDE-*.md; do ! grep -q 'Planning Docs' "$f" && echo OK; done
